description: Style Notejockey bras offer the best comfort and support for any occasion. This is one brand you can rely on to give you the comfort you need without letting you down in the style stakes. From Sports bras to glamourous evening-wear options, jockey bras make sure you get the look and support you need, whatever your shape or requirements.Product DetailsMedium coverage seamless moulded bra with hidden soft cups that provide natural shapingTrendy design and double layered cups that provide complete support and excellent cup FitSoft and adjustable spaghetti straps that rest comfortably on your shoulders leaving no marks on your skinMaterial and CareCotton/elastaneMachine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanFlat dry in shade Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
